hard_stops.logic: project must be initialized before any fire and life safety review activities begin
means of egress design has unresolved code violations — life safety risk and cannot obtain certificate of occupancy
fire-resistance-rated assemblies have deficiencies — structural and compartmentation integrity compromised

soft_flags.logic: fire marshal plan review comments remain unresolved — must be addressed before permit issuance
fire sprinkler system design is not yet complete — schedule impact if not finalized before rough-in
building qualifies as high-rise — additional fire protection, structural, and egress requirements apply
fire protection system testing or inspection is overdue — NFPA compliance and occupancy at risk
